item.title: How to walk
item.description: Understanding Prohairesis in Stoicism 🧘‍♂️ Stoicism is a philosophical school of thought that has captivated the minds of thinkers and philosophers for centuries. Central to Stoicism is the concept of prohairesis, a term that encompasses the ethical core of this philosophy. In this article, we will dive deep into what prohairesis means, its significance in Stoic philosophy, and how it relates to our daily lives. Table of Contents What is Prohairesis?

item.title: The Art of Prosoche in Stoicism 🤔📜
item.description: Stoicism, with its roots in ancient Greece, offers a profound philosophy for modern life. One of its central principles, Prosoche, is a concept that can greatly enhance our daily existence. 🧘‍♂️ Let’s explore the idea of Prosoche in Stoicism and how it can be applied to our contemporary world. Table of Contents Understanding Prosoche Practical Applications Prosoche in the Workplace Further Reading Understanding Prosoche Prosoche (προσοχή in Greek) can be translated as “attention” or “mindfulness.
